about.title: About
about.description: About Now. — Pop rock band from Vienna
about.bio_1: Now. are three musicians from Vienna who have been making earthy pop rock together since 2019. What started as casual jam sessions quickly became a band with their own sound — somewhere between alternative rock and indie pop, always grounded.
about.bio_2: With their debut album 'Out' (2024, Tonherd Music), Now. put their journey on record: honest songs about life, love, and everything in between. Live, Now. are in their element — energetic, direct, and close to the audience.

press.title: Press / EPK
press.label: Label
press.press_bio: Now. are a pop rock band from Vienna. Since 2019, the three musicians have been crafting earthy, honest songs — somewhere between alternative rock and indie pop. Their debut album 'Out' was released in 2024 on Tonherd Music. Live, Now. are in their element: energetic, direct, close to the audience.
